title: Hugging Face proposes Agentic Resource Discovery for finding tools, skills, and agents
friendlyTitle: Hugging Face wants agents to find the right tools by themselves
summary: Hugging Face introduced Agentic Resource Discovery, an open draft specification for letting agents search registries of tools, skills, MCP servers, apps, and other agents at runtime. The effort includes contributors from Microsoft, Google, GoDaddy, Hugging Face, and others, plus a Hugging Face Discover reference implementation.
friendlySummary: Hugging Face shared a draft standard that helps AI agents search for tools, skills, and other agents when they need them.
whyItMatters: Today’s agents mostly use capabilities that people pre-install for them. A discovery layer could make agents more flexible, but it also raises important questions about trust, publisher identity, compliance signals, and permission boundaries.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make agents more useful because they would not need every tool set up in advance. But it also means trust and safety checks become more important.
